DEFINE VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
	TREATAS({2021,
		2022,
		2023,
		2024,

		2026,
		2020}, 'DimDate'[Year])

metrics.visualTitle: Average Price by Year and Fuel Type

metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('DimDate'[Year])), 'DimDate'[Year] <= 2024)

	VAR __ScopedCoreI0 = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'LocalDateTable_0d688abd-3a8e-4879-a6cb-e137539dfd4f'[Year],
			'Data'[Fuel Type],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			"Average_Price", '_Measures'[Average Price]
		)

	VAR __ScopedCoreDM0 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					'LocalDateTable_0d688abd-3a8e-4879-a6cb-e137539dfd4f'[Year],
					__DS0FilterTable,
					"MinDate", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('LocalDateTable_0d688abd-3a8e-4879-a6cb-e137539dfd4f'[Date])))
				)
			),
			NOT(ISBLANK('LocalDateTable_0d688abd-3a8e-4879-a6cb-e137539dfd4f'[Year]))
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			__ScopedCoreI0,
			__ScopedCoreDM0
		)

	VAR __DS0IntersectionCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0Core))

	VAR __DS0PrimaryDbCount = 
		CALCULATE(
			COUNTROWS(
				SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'LocalDateTable_0d688abd-3a8e-4879-a6cb-e137539dfd4f'[Year])
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0SecondaryDbCount = 
		CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'Data'[Fuel Type])))

	VAR __DS0BodyBinnedSample = 
		SAMPLEAXISWITHLOCALMINMAX(
			3500,
			__DS0Core,
			[MinDate],
			[Average_Price],
			350,
			'Data'[Fuel Type],
			ALPHABETICAL,
			ASC,
			105000,
			60
		)

	VAR __DS0SecondaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0BodyBinnedSample, 'Data'[Fuel Type])

	VAR __DS0SecondaryCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0SecondaryBase))

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX(
			__DS0BodyBinnedSample,
			"ColumnIndex",
			__DS0SecondaryBase,
			'Data'[Fuel Type],
			ASC
		)

EVALUATE
	ROW(
		"DS0IntersectionCount", __DS0IntersectionCount,
		"DS0PrimaryDbCount", __DS0PrimaryDbCount,
		"DS0SecondaryDbCount", __DS0SecondaryDbCount,
		"DS0SecondaryCount", __DS0SecondaryCount
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0SecondaryBase

ORDER BY
	'Data'[Fuel Type]

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'LocalDateTable_0d688abd-3a8e-4879-a6cb-e137539dfd4f'[Year], [ColumnIndex]

DEFINE VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
	TREATAS({"Diesel"}, 'Data'[Fuel Type])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		"Arrow_Color_Code", IGNORE('_Measures'[Arrow Color Code]),
		"Diesel_Callout_UI", IGNORE('_Measures'[Diesel Callout UI]),

metrics.visualTitle: Price YoY Change % by Year and Fuel Type

metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'DimDate'[Year],
			'Data'[Fuel Type],
			"Price_YoY_Change__", '_Measures'[Price YoY Change %]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'DimDate'[Year])

	VAR __DS0SecondaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'Data'[Fuel Type])

	VAR __DS0IntersectionCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0Core))

	VAR __DS0PrimaryCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0PrimaryBase))

	VAR __DS0SecondaryCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0SecondaryBase))

	VAR __DS0SpaceCount = (__DS0PrimaryCount * __DS0SecondaryCount)

	VAR __DS0SparseFactor = MIN(5, DIVIDE(__DS0SpaceCount, __DS0IntersectionCount))

	VAR __DS0TargetIntersectionCount = CEILING(3500 * __DS0SparseFactor, 1)

	VAR __DS0InitTargetPrimaryCount = 
		IF(
			__DS0IntersectionCount <= 3500,
			IF(
				__DS0SpaceCount <= __DS0TargetIntersectionCount,
				3500,
				FLOOR(
					SQRT(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount * DIVIDE(__DS0PrimaryCount, __DS0SecondaryCount)),
					1
				)
			),
			IF(
				AND(__DS0PrimaryCount > 800, __DS0SecondaryCount > 60),
				CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, 60), 1),
				IF(
					__DS0SecondaryCount > 60,
					__DS0PrimaryCount,
					CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, __DS0SecondaryCount), 1)
				)
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0InitTargetSecondaryCount = 
		IF(
			__DS0IntersectionCount <= 3500,
			IF(
				__DS0SpaceCount <= __DS0TargetIntersectionCount,
				3500,
				FLOOR(
					DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, FLOOR(
						SQRT(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount * DIVIDE(__DS0PrimaryCount, __DS0SecondaryCount)),
						1
					)),
					1
				)
			),
			IF(
				AND(__DS0PrimaryCount > 800, __DS0SecondaryCount > 60),
				60,
				IF(
					__DS0SecondaryCount > 60,
					CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, __DS0PrimaryCount), 1),
					__DS0SecondaryCount
				)
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0MinPrimaryCount = MIN(10, __DS0PrimaryCount)

	VAR __DS0MinSecondaryCount = MIN(10, __DS0SecondaryCount)

	VAR __DS0TargetPrimaryCount = 
		IF(
			__DS0InitTargetPrimaryCount < __DS0MinPrimaryCount,
			__DS0MinPrimaryCount,
			IF(
				__DS0InitTargetSecondaryCount < __DS0MinSecondaryCount,
				CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, __DS0MinSecondaryCount), 1),
				__DS0InitTargetPrimaryCount
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0TargetSecondaryCount = 
		IF(
			__DS0InitTargetPrimaryCount < __DS0MinPrimaryCount,
			CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, __DS0MinPrimaryCount), 1),
			IF(
				__DS0InitTargetSecondaryCount < __DS0MinSecondaryCount,
				__DS0MinSecondaryCount,
				__DS0InitTargetSecondaryCount
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0Primary = 
		SAMPLE(__DS0TargetPrimaryCount + 2, __DS0PrimaryBase, 'DimDate'[Year], 1)

	VAR __DS0Secondary = 
		TOPN(__DS0TargetSecondaryCount + 1, __DS0SecondaryBase, 'Data'[Fuel Type], 1)

	VAR __DS0BodyWithLimitedSecondary = 
		NATURALINNERJOIN(
			__DS0Core,
			__DS0Secondary
		)

	VAR __DS0KeyValues = 
		GROUPBY(
			__DS0BodyWithLimitedSecondary,
			'Data'[Fuel Type],
			"MinPrice_YoY_Change__", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [Price_YoY_Change__]),
			"MaxPrice_YoY_Change__", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [Price_YoY_Change__])
		)

	VAR __DS0KeyPoints = 
		SELECTCOLUMNS(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				FILTER(
					KEEPFILTERS(NATURALINNERJOIN(
						__DS0BodyWithLimitedSecondary,
						__DS0KeyValues
					)),
					AND(
						AND(
							OR(
								[Price_YoY_Change__] = [MinPrice_YoY_Change__],
								[Price_YoY_Change__] = [MaxPrice_YoY_Change__]
							),
							NOT([MinPrice_YoY_Change__] = [MaxPrice_YoY_Change__])
						),
						NOT([Price_YoY_Change__] = 0)
					)
				)
			),
			"'DimDate'[Year]", 'DimDate'[Year],
			"'Data'[Fuel Type]", 'Data'[Fuel Type],
			"Price_YoY_Change__", [Price_YoY_Change__]
		)

	VAR __DS0KeyPrimaryLimit = CEILING(DIVIDE(350, __DS0TargetSecondaryCount), 1)

	VAR __DS0KeyPrimaryValuesLimited = 
		TOPN(__DS0KeyPrimaryLimit, SUMMARIZE(__DS0KeyPoints, 'DimDate'[Year]), 'DimDate'[Year], 1)

	VAR __DS0KeyPrimaryLimitedCount = 
		CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0KeyPrimaryValuesLimited))

	VAR __DS0PrimaryKeyPoints = 
		DISTINCT(UNION(__DS0Primary, __DS0KeyPrimaryValuesLimited))

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			__DS0PrimaryKeyPoints,
			SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX(
				__DS0BodyWithLimitedSecondary,
				"ColumnIndex",

		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'DimDate'[Year])

	VAR __DS0SecondaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'Data'[Fuel Type])

	VAR __DS0IntersectionCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0Core))

	VAR __DS0PrimaryCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0PrimaryBase))

	VAR __DS0SecondaryCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0SecondaryBase))

	VAR __DS0SpaceCount = (__DS0PrimaryCount * __DS0SecondaryCount)

	VAR __DS0SparseFactor = MIN(5, DIVIDE(__DS0SpaceCount, __DS0IntersectionCount))

	VAR __DS0TargetIntersectionCount = CEILING(3500 * __DS0SparseFactor, 1)

	VAR __DS0InitTargetPrimaryCount = 
		IF(
			__DS0IntersectionCount <= 3500,
			IF(
				__DS0SpaceCount <= __DS0TargetIntersectionCount,
				3500,
				FLOOR(
					SQRT(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount * DIVIDE(__DS0PrimaryCount, __DS0SecondaryCount)),
					1
				)
			),
			IF(
				AND(__DS0PrimaryCount > 800, __DS0SecondaryCount > 60),
				CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, 60), 1),
				IF(
					__DS0SecondaryCount > 60,
					__DS0PrimaryCount,
					CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, __DS0SecondaryCount), 1)
				)
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0InitTargetSecondaryCount = 
		IF(
			__DS0IntersectionCount <= 3500,
			IF(
				__DS0SpaceCount <= __DS0TargetIntersectionCount,
				3500,
				FLOOR(
					DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, FLOOR(
						SQRT(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount * DIVIDE(__DS0PrimaryCount, __DS0SecondaryCount)),
						1
					)),
					1
				)
			),
			IF(
				AND(__DS0PrimaryCount > 800, __DS0SecondaryCount > 60),
				60,
				IF(
					__DS0SecondaryCount > 60,
					CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, __DS0PrimaryCount), 1),
					__DS0SecondaryCount
				)
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0MinPrimaryCount = MIN(10, __DS0PrimaryCount)

	VAR __DS0MinSecondaryCount = MIN(10, __DS0SecondaryCount)

	VAR __DS0TargetPrimaryCount = 
		IF(

				__DS0InitTargetPrimaryCount
			)
		)

		IF(

				__DS0InitTargetSecondaryCount

		TOPN(__DS0TargetSecondaryCount + 1, __DS0SecondaryBase, 'Data'[Fuel Type], 1)

		)

		GROUPBY(

			"MaxPrice_YoY_Change__", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [Price_YoY_Change__])
		)

	VAR __DS0KeyPoints = 
		SELECTCOLUMNS(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				FILTER(
					KEEPFILTERS(NATURALINNERJOIN(
						__DS0BodyWithLimitedSecondary,
						__DS0KeyValues
					)),
					AND(
						AND(
							OR(
								[Price_YoY_Change__] = [MinPrice_YoY_Change__],
								[Price_YoY_Change__] = [MaxPrice_YoY_Change__]
							),
							NOT([MinPrice_YoY_Change__] = [MaxPrice_YoY_Change__])
						),
						NOT([Price_YoY_Change__] = 0)
					)
				)
			),

	VAR __DS0KeyPrimaryLimitedCount = 
		CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0KeyPrimaryValuesLimited))

	VAR __DS0PrimaryKeyPoints = 
		DISTINCT(UNION(__DS0Primary, __DS0KeyPrimaryValuesLimited))

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			__DS0PrimaryKeyPoints,
			SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX(
				__DS0BodyWithLimitedSecondary,
				"ColumnIndex",
				__DS0Secondary,
				'Data'[Fuel Type],
				ASC
			)
		)

EVALUATE
	ROW(

DEFINE

		TREATAS({2026}, 'DimDate'[Year])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'DimDate'[Year],
			'Data'[Fuel Type],
			"Price_YoY_Change__", '_Measures'[Price YoY Change %],
			"v_MeasuresPrice_YoY_Change__", IGNORE(CALCULATE('_Measures'[Price YoY Change %], KEEPFILTERS(__H0FilterTable)))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'DimDate'[Year])

	VAR __DS0SecondaryBase = 
		SUMMARIZE(__DS0Core, 'Data'[Fuel Type])

	VAR __DS0IntersectionCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0Core))

	VAR __DS0PrimaryCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0PrimaryBase))

	VAR __DS0SecondaryCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0SecondaryBase))

	VAR __DS0SpaceCount = (__DS0PrimaryCount * __DS0SecondaryCount)

	VAR __DS0SparseFactor = MIN(5, DIVIDE(__DS0SpaceCount, __DS0IntersectionCount))

	VAR __DS0TargetIntersectionCount = CEILING(3500 * __DS0SparseFactor, 1)

	VAR __DS0InitTargetPrimaryCount = 
		IF(
			__DS0IntersectionCount <= 3500,
			IF(
				__DS0SpaceCount <= __DS0TargetIntersectionCount,
				3500,
				FLOOR(
					SQRT(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount * DIVIDE(__DS0PrimaryCount, __DS0SecondaryCount)),
					1
				)
			),
			IF(
				AND(__DS0PrimaryCount > 800, __DS0SecondaryCount > 60),
				CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, 60), 1),
				IF(
					__DS0SecondaryCount > 60,
					__DS0PrimaryCount,
					CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, __DS0SecondaryCount), 1)
				)
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0InitTargetSecondaryCount = 
		IF(
			__DS0IntersectionCount <= 3500,
			IF(
				__DS0SpaceCount <= __DS0TargetIntersectionCount,
				3500,
				FLOOR(
					DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, FLOOR(
						SQRT(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount * DIVIDE(__DS0PrimaryCount, __DS0SecondaryCount)),
						1
					)),
					1
				)
			),
			IF(
				AND(__DS0PrimaryCount > 800, __DS0SecondaryCount > 60),
				60,
				IF(
					__DS0SecondaryCount > 60,
					CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, __DS0PrimaryCount), 1),
					__DS0SecondaryCount
				)
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0MinPrimaryCount = MIN(10, __DS0PrimaryCount)

	VAR __DS0MinSecondaryCount = MIN(10, __DS0SecondaryCount)

	VAR __DS0TargetPrimaryCount = 
		IF(
			__DS0InitTargetPrimaryCount < __DS0MinPrimaryCount,
			__DS0MinPrimaryCount,
			IF(
				__DS0InitTargetSecondaryCount < __DS0MinSecondaryCount,
				CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, __DS0MinSecondaryCount), 1),
				__DS0InitTargetPrimaryCount
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0TargetSecondaryCount = 
		IF(
			__DS0InitTargetPrimaryCount < __DS0MinPrimaryCount,
			CEILING(DIVIDE(__DS0TargetIntersectionCount, __DS0MinPrimaryCount), 1),
			IF(
				__DS0InitTargetSecondaryCount < __DS0MinSecondaryCount,
				__DS0MinSecondaryCount,
				__DS0InitTargetSecondaryCount
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0Primary = 
		SAMPLE(__DS0TargetPrimaryCount + 2, __DS0PrimaryBase, 'DimDate'[Year], 1)

	VAR __DS0Secondary = 
		TOPN(__DS0TargetSecondaryCount + 1, __DS0SecondaryBase, 'Data'[Fuel Type], 1)

	VAR __DS0BodyWithLimitedSecondary = 
		NATURALINNERJOIN(
			__DS0Core,
			__DS0Secondary
		)

	VAR __DS0KeyValues = 
		GROUPBY(
			__DS0BodyWithLimitedSecondary,
			'Data'[Fuel Type],
			"MinPrice_YoY_Change__", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [Price_YoY_Change__]),
			"MaxPrice_YoY_Change__", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [Price_YoY_Change__])
		)

	VAR __DS0KeyPoints = 
		SELECTCOLUMNS(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				FILTER(
					KEEPFILTERS(NATURALINNERJOIN(
						__DS0BodyWithLimitedSecondary,
						__DS0KeyValues
					)),
					AND(
						AND(
							OR(
								[Price_YoY_Change__] = [MinPrice_YoY_Change__],
								[Price_YoY_Change__] = [MaxPrice_YoY_Change__]
							),
							NOT([MinPrice_YoY_Change__] = [MaxPrice_YoY_Change__])
						),
						NOT([Price_YoY_Change__] = 0)
					)
				)
			),
			"'DimDate'[Year]", 'DimDate'[Year],
			"'Data'[Fuel Type]", 'Data'[Fuel Type],
			"Price_YoY_Change__", [Price_YoY_Change__],
			"v_MeasuresPrice_YoY_Change__", [v_MeasuresPrice_YoY_Change__]
		)

	VAR __DS0KeyPrimaryLimit = CEILING(DIVIDE(350, __DS0TargetSecondaryCount), 1)

	VAR __DS0KeyPrimaryValuesLimited = 
		TOPN(__DS0KeyPrimaryLimit, SUMMARIZE(__DS0KeyPoints, 'DimDate'[Year]), 'DimDate'[Year], 1)

	VAR __DS0KeyPrimaryLimitedCount = 
		CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0KeyPrimaryValuesLimited))

	VAR __DS0PrimaryKeyPoints = 
		DISTINCT(UNION(__DS0Primary, __DS0KeyPrimaryValuesLimited))

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		NATURALLEFTOUTERJOIN(
			__DS0PrimaryKeyPoints,
			SUBSTITUTEWITHINDEX(
				__DS0BodyWithLimitedSecondary,
				"ColumnIndex",
				__DS0Secondary,
				'Data'[Fuel Type],
				ASC
			)
		)

EVALUATE
	ROW(
		"DS0IntersectionCount", __DS0IntersectionCount,
		"DS0PrimaryCount", __DS0PrimaryCount,
		"DS0TargetPrimaryCount", __DS0TargetPrimaryCount,
		"DS0SecondaryCount", __DS0SecondaryCount,
		"DS0TargetSecondaryCount", __DS0TargetSecondaryCount,
		"DS0KeyPrimaryLimitedCount", __DS0KeyPrimaryLimitedCount,
		"DS0KeyPrimaryLimit", __DS0KeyPrimaryLimit
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0Secondary

ORDER BY
	'Data'[Fuel Type]
